title: HideAllPlayers
description: Hide everyone in your world using an item
body:
# HideAllPlayers

A lightweight, intuitive solution for server performance optimization and distraction-free gameplay

## Overview

Are you running a crowded server or working on detailed builds that demand focus? This plugin offers a seamless way to toggle player visibility with a single click. By placing a special item in slot 9 of your hotbar, you can instantly show or hide all players on the server.

## Key Features

🔍 **Instant Visibility Control** - Toggle between seeing everyone or no one with a simple right-click
  
🎮 **Intuitive Color Indicators** - Green dye means players are visible, gray dye means they're hidden

⚙️ **Server Performance Optimization** - Reduce client-side lag on crowded servers by hiding player models

🔄 **Persistent Settings** - Your visibility preference is maintained between sessions

🧰 **Slot 9 Integration** - The toggle item is automatically placed in slot 9 of your hotbar upon joining

📝 **Fully Customizable** - Change item names, lore text, and messages through the config.yml

## Perfect For

- **Creative Builders** who need distraction-free environments
- **Server Administrators** looking to offer performance optimization options
- **Survival Players** in high-traffic areas who want to reduce visual clutter
- **Event Hosts** managing large groups of participants

## Technical Benefits

- Minimal server resource usage
- No dependencies required
- Optimized for all Minecraft versions 1.20+

## Why Choose This Plugin?

Unlike similar solutions that rely on commands or complex menus, this plugin focuses on simplicity and accessibility. The visual indicator in your hotbar ensures you always know your current visibility status, while the right-click toggle means you're always one click away from changing it.

## Installation

1. Download the plugin JAR file
2. Place it in your server's plugins folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configuration is optional - the plugin works out-of-the-box!

Elevate your Minecraft experience with this essential server utility - where visibility becomes a choice, not a constant.
